pdg_node.statement: (graph: Graph, lattice_instance: LatticeInstance, previously_generated_subgraphs: Collection[Subgraph], seed: int) -> GreedyMappingContext
pdg_node.informal_desc: Bootstraps immutable problem context for all later kernels: graph topology, lattice abstraction, lattice instance, previously generated subgraphs, and seed.

declaration.name: init_problem_context
declaration.type_signature: (graph: Graph, lattice_instance: LatticeInstance, previously_generated_subgraphs: Collection[Subgraph], seed: int) -> GreedyMappingContext
declaration.docstring: Bootstraps immutable problem context for all later kernels: graph topology, lattice abstraction, lattice instance, previously generated subgraphs, and seed.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Deterministic Immutable Context Bootstrap. Aggregates multiple heterogeneous structural inputs into a single immutable state carrier that is passed unchanged across later computational kernels. The transform performs no optimization or inference; it formalizes boundary conditions by binding a read-only relational topology, a discrete embedding/placement scaffold context, historical substructure constraints, and a reproducibility token into one canonical context object. This creates a stable reference frame so downstream greedy or stochastic procedures can be evaluated consistently.. Applications: Initializing a molecular conformation search pipeline with a fixed bond graph, spatial discretization schema, prior sampled motifs, and a random seed, Bootstrapping robotic path-planning with workspace connectivity, occupancy grid instance, previously explored trajectory fragments, and deterministic rollout seed, Preparing a distributed scheduling optimizer using system dependency topology, resource-slot lattice instance, prior allocation patterns, and reproducible simulation seed
